claims.summary: The semantic projection is now 48-dimensional and maps the 768-dimensional embedding into an 8-dimensional semantic segment.
claims.disposition: verify the projection constants and deterministic semantic projection

claims.summary: Tail vibrancy should open smoothly above the 0.85 entropy gate and respond to local density gradient.
claims.disposition: verify the smoothstep gate and gradient-aware vibrancy calculation

claims.summary: Entropy 0.86 with density gradient 0.12 needs an exact test proving that texture is neither flattened nor unbounded.
claims.disposition: add a geometric 0.86/0.12 regression that proves small nonzero lift and bounded tail headroom

claims.summary: A dynamic gradient ceiling can preserve texture without silently changing current output.
claims.disposition: verify the existing bounded aperture and its default identity behavior

claims.summary: Enabling or tuning the dynamic ceiling would change live codec transport or gain behavior.
claims.disposition: require scoped Mike/operator Tier 5 approval, replay, abort criteria, and post-change felt review
